name: sdlc-agents
description: Codex plugin for SDLC workflows with Jira and Confluence integration through Atlassian MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, track, and document SDLC work from Codex.
interface.longDescription: SDLC Agents connects Codex to Jira Cloud and Confluence Cloud through Atlassian's official remote MCP server, with guided workflows for assigned work, JQL search, issue creation, comments, transitions, boards, sprints, page search, page creation, document updates, and Markdown-to-Confluence sync. It also documents REST fallbacks for API-token environments.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use SDLC Agents to show my latest Jira task and related Confluence context.
